parameters.query:
INSERT INTO lecturas_sensor (idempotency_key, sensor_id, temperature, humidity, co2, timestamp, nivel_alerta, anomalias, run_id)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.idempotency_key }}',
  '{{ $json.lectura.sensor_id }}',
  {{ $json.lectura.temperature }},
  {{ $json.lectura.humidity }},
  {{ $json.lectura.co2 }},
  '{{ $json.lectura.timestamp }}',
  '{{ $json.analisis.nivel }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.analisis.anomalias) }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ $json.run_id }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (idempotency_key) DO NOTHING
RETURNING id, idempotency_key
